summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright E2E for PAWS TRAINING MVP. Core public booking and admin workflows are functional end-to-end.

issues: Console warnings from chart containers: ResponsiveContainer reports width/height -1 during render.
Accessibility warning: DialogContent missing Description/aria-describedby in at least two dialogs.

action_items: Fix chart container sizing warnings to avoid noisy console output and potential chart rendering instability on resize.
Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby for dialog accessibility compliance.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is large (~1500 lines); split into smaller modules/components to improve maintainability and testability.
Dynamic data-testid generation includes human labels with spaces (hero stats), which can reduce selector reliability for automation.
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings/programs via API with TEST-prefixed names and unique emails during regression runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested flows pass on public URL. Backend regression suite added and passing (9 tests). Frontend E2E passed for landing, booking, admin auth, dashboard, bookings, program save, capacity save, settings save, and route protection.
rca of the issue: No functional blocking bugs found. Non-blocking console/accessibility warnings likely from initial render timing of Recharts containers and missing dialog description props.
